name: OpenLMNP
description: Open-source French rental accounting software (LMNP) for Airbnb hosts. Manage properties, incomes, expenses, depreciation, and generate tax returns (liasse fiscale).

notes.text: Admin account and a random password are generated during installation and saved to /opt/openlmnp/admin_credentials.txt inside the container. Change the password after first login.
Data is stored in SQLite at /opt/openlmnp/database/database.sqlite. Back up this file regularly.
